## What is FreeScout?

FreeScout is a free, open-source help desk and shared inbox built in PHP (Laravel). It's designed as a self-hosted alternative to paid tools like Zendesk and Help Scout, giving teams full control over their data and infrastructure. The core platform covers unlimited agents, tickets, and mailboxes — premium modules extend it to CRM, live chat, knowledge base, and integrations.

## Who is it for?

Teams with technical resources to self-host who want a professional help desk without ongoing per-seat costs. It suits privacy-conscious organizations, bootstrapped startups, and companies that have outgrown shared Gmail but can't justify $50+/agent/month for commercial alternatives.

## Strengths

- **Completely free** — unlimited agents and mailboxes at zero cost on your own infrastructure.
- **Data ownership** — runs on your servers; no third-party access to customer conversations.
- **Module ecosystem** — extend with CRM, knowledge base, live chat, WhatsApp, Slack, Telegram, and Jira modules.
- **Mobile apps** — native iOS and Android apps for agents.
- **8+ years of active development** — stable, maintained project with multilingual support (30+ languages).

## What to consider

- Requires a server to run and basic technical knowledge to install and maintain.
- No official SLA or enterprise support — community forums and paid installation services only.
- Modules add cost; a fully-featured setup with several premium modules can approach the cost of lower-tier commercial plans.

## Bottom line

FreeScout delivers genuine help desk functionality for the cost of hosting. If your team has someone technical enough to manage a PHP app on shared hosting, it's a hard value proposition to beat. If you need a SaaS product your non-technical ops team can maintain on their own, look at commercial alternatives instead.
